title: Froriepia subpinnata
taxonomy: Froriepia subpinnata is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of South Africa. The exact classification of Froriepia subpinnata is as follows: it belongs to the kingdom Plantae, class Magnoliopsida, order Gentianales, family Gentianaceae, genus Froriepia, and species F. subpinnata. This classification is based on its morphology and phylogenetic relationships with other plants in the Gentianaceae family. Further research may be needed to confirm its exact classification.
